problem: Can protein structure be predicted from sequence in real time without AlphaFold compute cost?
mechanism: DNA computing for massively parallel search
hypothesis: Can protein structure be predicted from sequence in real time without AlphaFold compute cost? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of DNA. DNA computing for massively parallel search directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Hardware prototype with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
